name: Licorice-Stick Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Licorice sticks, cut into 1/4 inch pieces (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored, about 4 or 5 minutes.
2. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine the beaten egg yolks, sugar, whipping cream, and half and half. Cook and stir over low heat until the mixture thickens slightly and coats a metal spoon; set aside.
3. In a blender or food processor, blend the cut-up licorice sticks with milk until the licorice pieces resemble grains of cooked rice.
4. Stir the blended licorice into the egg mixture.
5. Cool to room temperature.
6. Pour into an ice cream canister.
7. Freeze in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's directions. Makes about 2 quarts.
